phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the hilltop viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Comment monte-t-on au belvédère de la Côte de Grâce ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN MOHNT-tohn oh bel-vay-DAIR duh lah KOHT duh GRAHS
phrases.cultural_note: The Côte de Grâce hill rises directly above Honfleur and is reached on foot via a steep wooded path from the harbour in about 20 minutes, or by car. The summit offers panoramic views over the Seine estuary, the Normandy Bridge, and on clear days, the coast of Calvados.

responses.english: Follow the path up the hill.
responses.phonetic: swee-VAY luh shuh-MEHN ahn OH duh lah KOHT
responses.local: Suivez le chemin en haut de la côte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the chapel at the top is open
phrases.text_local: La chapelle en haut est-elle ouverte ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah shah-PEL ahn OH eh-TEL oo-VEHRT
phrases.cultural_note: The Chapelle Notre-Dame de Grâce at the top of the hill is usually open during daytime hours.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view of the Normandy Bridge from here
phrases.text_local: Peut-on voir le pont de Normandie depuis ce belvédère ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN vwahr luh POHN duh nor-mahn-DEE duh-PWEE suh bel-vay-DAIR
phrases.cultural_note: The Pont de Normandie, opened in 1994, is visible from the Côte de Grâce viewpoint. At 856 metres it was the world's longest cable-stayed bridge when completed. It connects Honfleur to Le Havre across the Seine estuary.

responses.english: Yes, on a clear day you can see it well.
responses.phonetic: wee, par TAHN KLEHR ohn luh vwah BYEHN
responses.local: Oui, par temps clair on le voit bien.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the wooded walking path up the hill
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un sentier pédestre balisé pour monter à la Côte de Grâce ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn sahn-TYAY pay-des-TRUH bah-lee-ZAY poor mohn-TAY ah lah KOHT duh GRAHS
phrases.cultural_note: A signed footpath (sentier balisé) winds up through the woods from the south side of the old harbour. The walk is pleasant and shaded in summer. Wear comfortable shoes as the gradient is steep in places.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is parking near the top
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un parking en haut ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn par-KEENG ahn OH
phrases.cultural_note: There is a small car park near the chapel at the top of the Côte de Grâce.

responses.english: Yes, a small free car park.
